name: Pet Hair Removal Brush 15.5x7.5cm
description: Pet hair removal brush with soft silicone gel material, cleans furniture, carpet, home and car interior. Remove unwanted animal hair from Labrador, Border collie, cats, Corgi, Eskimo etc. A new professional ergonomic design, equipped with double-layer zigzag silica gel hairbrush, easily clean the deep stubborn hair. Easy to carry, clean the home fabric and carpet. Cleans corner and depressions not accessible by other brushes. It makes a great gift to your friends or family.
